description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the gradle:4.8.0-jdk8 Docker image. Define two stages: build and test. In the build stage add a job named job1 that runs `gradle clean assemble`, then in after_script moves `build/libs/saturnshell-0.0.5-SNAPSHOT.jar` to `build/libs/SaturnShell.jar` and stores `build/libs/SaturnShell.jar` as an artifact. In the test stage add a job named job2 that runs `gradle clean test` and is limited to the master branch of the Redrield/SaturnShell project via an only rule. No caches, services, or deployment targets are defined.
